app.name: Soukly
app.tagline: The e-commerce platform built for Algeria

hero.title: Create your online store in
hero.subtitle: The e-commerce platform built for Algeria. CCP payment, BaridiMob, Yalidine delivery, and AI that manages your store.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Powerful tools to grow your online business in Algeria
features.storeDesc: Create your online store in a few clicks, no technical skills needed
features.paymentDesc: CCP, BaridiMob, Chargily, Edahabia, COD — all Algerian payment methods
features.shippingDesc: Yalidine, ZR Express, Ecotrack integration — automatic fee calculation per wilaya
features.aiDesc: An intelligent assistant that analyzes your data and helps you make the right decisions
features.landingDesc: Generate optimized sales pages with artificial intelligence
features.smsDesc: Send targeted SMS campaigns to your Algerian customers
features.analyticsDesc: Track your sales, visitors and performance in real-time
features.multilangDesc: Arabic, French, English — your store speaks your customers' language
features.automationDesc: Automate SMS, emails and stock updates effortlessly

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes! The free plan lets you create a store with up to 50 products and 100 orders per month. No credit card required.
faq.a2: Soukly supports cash on delivery (COD), CCP, BaridiMob, Chargily Pay (Edahabia/CIB), bank transfer, and even Flexy.
faq.a3: Soukly is integrated with Yalidine, ZR Express, Ecotrack and Procolis. Shipping fees are automatically calculated per wilaya.
faq.q4: Can AI really manage my store?
faq.a4: The AI assistant can generate product descriptions, create landing pages, analyze sales, suggest marketing actions and even execute certain tasks automatically.
faq.a5: Yes! Soukly supports Arabic (with full RTL), French and English. Your customers can browse in their preferred language.
faq.q6: Can I use my own domain name?
faq.a6: Yes, starting from the Pro plan, you can connect your own domain. The free plan includes a subdomain yourstore.soukly.com.
faq.a7: You can send SMS to your customers by wilaya, tags or purchase history. The Starter plan includes 500 SMS/month, Pro is unlimited.
faq.a8: No commitment. You can change plans or cancel anytime. Annual plans get a 20% discount.
